description: Have to clean up Business tab, will define later what to do.

the full IBKR page needs to be redone.

Step 1) Get all the data from excel under tab Stock ETF listing and Precious Metals. Stock ETF Lisitng column D gives all the ETFs, column I gives all REITs. Precious metals column O gives all precious metals, column V from stock ETF list give all Bonds. Need to create a database/ page under planning for this list where a user can add a new symbol if required. If there is a position where sumbol doesnt match then it needs to be called Public Stock.

Step 2)
2 csvs to be uploaded, 1 will give positions per symbol, download all data available, at the bottom there is a list of dividends per symbol. matching that to asset class to symbol list you can get dividend and value per each asset class. 
2nd csv will give you all transactions and hence cash invested/ sold per symbol and hence per asset class post matching against the list. This needs to be updated into each asset class Net Capital for that year end.

Before uploading csv, the app should ask for which year the user is uploading the csvs and also check against csvs date if its matching.
Get maths working in a cell
How does different scenarios work, define it well and build it

Whya re expected reutnrs in FX & Setting different from scenario settings? Make it the same
How are PE scenarios work as there is a multiplier & outright numbers.  Add them in the FX & Settings page
Check hisotircal inputs for liquid, check IRR
Create a sharp down scenario. Works better than bad bear case. Like a 50% drop and then base case IRR

GUI - 
Back the background Black Black, pitch black like Dolby.
Give color formar like Bloomberg terminal. 
Make all tables/ grids small, optimize screen space. More data needs to be shown in less area.
Show the user multiple options before executing such that we can optimize how to look before changing.
Cash Flow Table seems not really readable, think of ideas to make it better and share then we can choose.

Good that we see items missing on top for any asset class for the year updated like 2025,  but not easy to find which ones. Can you make it such that when you hover over we can see which assets valuations are not present.

Only update background yellow where that cell is manually entered, Liquid assets the whole row is in yellow. Only the cell. Now in private equity valuations where historical numbers are entered manually and not a formula its not in yellow. Needs to be symmetric across the app. Have told you 10 times now, please take time, clarify and then execute. Any confusion please ask, literally go through each table/ grid and see what is manual. All historical data from excel needs to be treated manually as in future or a new user will not upload an excel but just start from ground 0.

Can you create Google login required and data is stored per user on Google account which is secure and nobody can access it without the login. The idea is to convert this app into multi-user. 
Also go over the full code base and see what you need to teach a new user to use the app and put it in Rules & Docs. The idea hsould  RUles & Docs can teach any new user. Use photos/ videos with random numbers from the curernt app as well to teach users.
Bonds valuation from 2025 was not updated from IBKR. There were no Bonds so should be 0. Race condition.
Wealth tax/ Income tax needs to be implemented
Make cash flow editable for anything which is manual entry like life expense. Things which are coming from different tables make them white. Basicallly merge summary table and edit tabs.
Make cash flow editable for anything which is manual entry like life expense. Things which are coming from different tables make them white. Basicallly merge summary table and edit tabs.
